title: 20 Napkins Christmas Cat in Snow on the Go Table Decoration Paper Napkins with Motif Also for Decoupage and Decoupage 33 x 33 cm
features: Contents: each pack contains 20 napkins. These are each 3-ply, so not too thin.
Design: beautiful motif as a table decoration for special occasions (colour variations possible)
Quality: these paper napkins are produced under high quality standards in Europe and are subject to constant inspection
Environment: the production takes place only from environmentally friendly raw materials and are biodegradable

Dimensions: the motif napkins are open 33 x 33 cm. In the pack folded to 16.5 x 16.5 cm. You can see 1/4 of the motif in the main picture. By the way: the napkins are suitable for crafting with decoupage / decoupage technique
description: Product details: - Motif napkins. - Design as shown (colour variations possible). - Image = ¼ of the napkin. - Blank reverse side. - 3-ply. - Open format: 33 x 33 cm. - Folded to: 16.5 x 16.5 cm. - Material: paper (tissue). - Made in Europe. - Environmentally conscious and gentle production. We offer the most beautiful designs from the napkin collection from the most famous German manufacturers. These stand for environmentally conscious and gentle production. The trendy motifs make every meal a pleasurable experience. Of course, the napkins can also be used for decoupage crafts. With our napkins you can personalise your table decoration and create a harmonious atmosphere. Mix and match different motifs and colours to create a unique look that will delight your guests. Make your next event an unforgettable experience with our themed napkins. They are not only practical, but also a real eye-catcher on your table. Let your creativity run wild and turn your table decoration into something special. Here in our shop you will also find candles, handkerchiefs, table runners, tablecloths and an almost unlimited versatile range of other napkins
